mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.course_id, r.user_id, r.rating, r.review_content, r.like_count, r.is_visible, r.create_time, u.nick_name, u.avatar FROM osh_course_review r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE r.course_id = #{courseId} AND r.is_visible = 1 ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as bad_count, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as medium_count, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as good_count, COUNT(*) as total_count, AVG(rating) as average_rating FROM osh_course_review WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND is_visible = 1
